items.definition_en: The wrist is the joint connecting the hand to the arm.
items.example_en: She wore a bracelet on her left wrist.

items.definition_en: The ankle is the joint connecting the foot and the leg.
items.example_en: He twisted his ankle while running.

items.definition_en: A cheek is the soft part of the face below the eyes.
items.example_en: She kissed him on the cheek.

items.definition_en: The jaw is the lower part of the face that moves when you chew.
items.example_en: His jaw hurt after the dentist visit.

items.definition_en: A thumb is the short, thick first finger on your hand.
items.example_en: She gave a thumbs-up to show approval.

items.definition_en: An eyelash is one of the small hairs growing at the edge of the eyelids.
items.example_en: She has very long eyelashes.

items.definition_en: An eyebrow is the line of hair above the eye.
items.example_en: He raised his eyebrow in surprise.

items.definition_en: The chin is the part of your face below your mouth.
items.example_en: He rested his chin on his hand.

items.definition_en: The forehead is the part of the face above the eyes.
items.example_en: She has a scar on her forehead.

items.definition_en: The heel is the back part of your foot below the ankle.
items.example_en: My heels hurt after walking all day.

items.definition_en: A lip is one of the two soft edges of the mouth.
items.example_en: She bit her lip nervously.

items.definition_en: The palm is the inner surface of your hand.
items.example_en: He placed the coin in her palm.

items.definition_en: The waist is the part of the body above the hips and below the ribs.
items.example_en: She tied a belt around her waist.

items.definition_en: The chest is the front part of your body between the neck and the stomach.
items.example_en: He crossed his arms over his chest.

items.definition_en: A thumb nail is the hard surface that covers the top of your thumb.
items.example_en: He cut his thumb nail too short.

items.definition_en: The shoulder blade is the flat bone at the back of your shoulder.
items.example_en: She felt pain in her left shoulder blade.

items.definition_en: The calf is the back part of the lower leg.
items.example_en: He strained a muscle in his calf.

items.definition_en: The forearm is the part of the arm between the wrist and the elbow.
items.example_en: She supported her head with her forearm.

items.definition_en: A rib is one of the bones that form a cage around your chest.
items.example_en: He broke a rib during the game.

items.definition_en: A nail is the hard covering at the end of a finger or toe.
items.example_en: She painted her nails bright red.
